a:r.a:t: Strong benefits with trade-offs to weigh
Secures exclusive access to premium franchises
Protect Capital Discipline & Reduce Overpayment Risk
Ties acquisition decision to KPI performance
Avoids emotional bidding wars (Warner Bros example)
Avoid cultural clash, legacy studio complexity and bureaucratization
Creates Strategic Flexibility in an Uncertain Industry
Monetization, Increase ARPU; Retention Decrease Churn.
Extend if neutral, exit if underperforming.
